title: Shine On You Crazy Diamond
why_this_song: Shine On You Crazy Diamond by Pink Floyd (1975) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Now there's a look in your eyes
Like black holes in the sky
Well, you wore out your welcome

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "shine" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "shine" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "crazy" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "crazy" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You were caught in the crossfire
Shine on, you crazy diamond (you crazy diamond)

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You reached for the secret too soon

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Shine On You Crazy Diamond" was released in 1975. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Shine On You Crazy Diamond" foi lançada em 1975. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Shine On You Crazy Diamond" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Shine On You Crazy Diamond" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Shine On You Crazy Diamond" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Shine On You Crazy Diamond" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?
